calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah Muise, 756-8666, defendant appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DEBORAH MUISE'S DEMURRER TO First AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend because the three day notice failed to comply with statutory requirement to notify tenant of alternative to perform condition of lease. CCP 1161(3). Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
